title: astragalus distans
intro: Astragalus distans, also known as the distant milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, characterized by its yellow or purple flowers and a hairy stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. The medicinal properties of Astragalus distans have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving respiratory function, and enhancing the body's natural defense mechanisms. In herbal preparations, Astragalus distans is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote overall health and well-being.
